_comment: Synthetic Teams #atlas-incident channel posts for the Atlas payments outage. Used for the mitigation (channel + action tracker) multi-signal question and the chronological timeline synthesis.

teams_messages.author: PPL-008
teams_messages.text: Mitigation rolled out: rolled back Atlas payments from v4.7 to v4.6. Rollback completed at 11:05. This is the mitigation that cleared the connection-pool leak. — Liam

teams_messages.author: PPL-005
teams_messages.text: Post-rollback error rate dropping fast — 38% down to 2% and falling. Monitoring continues. The mitigation (rollback to v4.6) is holding.

teams_messages.author: PPL-002
teams_messages.text: Confirmed: v4.7 connection-pool leak was the root cause. Do not re-deploy v4.7 until the pool-size cap is in. Tracking a permanent fix.

teams_messages.author: PPL-001
teams_messages.text: Reminder: the incident & action tracker is our single source of truth for open actions. I'll create/update action items for monitoring and customer-comms there.

teams_messages.author: PPL-009
teams_messages.text: Merchant support is staffed and ready for the customer-comms send. No open items on the support side beyond awaiting the comms commitment.
